public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as field naturalist.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a field naturalist still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of field naturalist in and around Glyph-Engraved Monoliths, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Glyph-Engraved Monoliths workable through the obligations of field naturalist while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Glyph-Engraved Monoliths, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of field naturalist visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Liora Lightloom needs help with a problem in Glyph-Engraved Monoliths that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Liora Lightloom can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Liora Lightloom carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

first_impression: Liora Lightloom presents as Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a field naturalist still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Field Naturalist, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Shelk.
what_they_refuse: Liora Lightloom refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Field Naturalist too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Liora Lightloom can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Liora Lightloom adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Liora Lightloom is Known locally through day-to-day work as field naturalist. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Field Naturalist.
